properties.name: flyway.enabled
properties.description: Enable Flyway-like database migration for SQLite.

properties.name: flyway.baseline-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to automatically call baseline when migrations are found for non-empty schemas.

properties.name: flyway.baseline-version
properties.description: The version to tag an existing schema with when executing baseline.

properties.name: ai.user-model-selection.enabled
properties.description: Allow users to customize AI model in profile.
